---
title: "Contraction"
author: "Aleksandra"
date: "2026-08-16"
categories: []
description: ""
image: "thumb.jpg"
title-block-banner: true
---

Early in his career Dimitri Mendeleyev was requested to solve the mystery of alcohol disappearing in the Sint Petersburg’s distillery. The principals noticed that the amounts of water and spirit, two plain substrates used in the process, were noticeably greater than the amount of produced vodka. Instead of taking the path of least effort and accusing the workers of stealing, they demonstrated growth mindset and inquired a scientific investigation from a promising chemist. 
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

source("../../assets/inferno_palette.R")
library(plotly)

ethanol <- c(39.9, 40.1, 42.0, 43.8, 45.0, 45.7, 46.2, 47.9, 49.5, 50.3, 51.8, 53.9)

c0  <- c(4.06, 4.07, 4.11, 4.13, 4.15, 4.15, 4.15, 4.13, 4.12, 4.11, 4.08, 4.03)
c10 <- c(3.82, 3.82, 3.86, 3.89, 3.90, 3.90, 3.90, 3.88, 3.87, 3.85, 3.83, 3.79)
c15 <- c(3.71, 3.72, 3.75, 3.77, 3.78, 3.79, 3.79, 3.78, 3.77, 3.76, 3.74, 3.70)
c20 <- c(3.57, 3.60, 3.65, NA,   3.68, 3.68, 3.68, 3.68, 3.67, 3.66, 3.65, 3.61)
c30 <- c(3.43, 3.44, 3.47, 3.49, 3.50, 3.50, 3.52, 3.51, 3.47, 3.47, 3.47, 3.45)

colors <- INFERNO$palette

plot_ly() %>%
  add_trace(x = ethanol, y = c0,  type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers',
            name = '0°C',  line = list(color = colors[3],  width = 2),
            marker = list(color = colors[3],  size = 9)) %>%
  add_trace(x = ethanol, y = c10, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers',
            name = '10°C', line = list(color = colors[5],  width = 2),
            marker = list(color = colors[5],  size = 9)) %>%
  add_trace(x = ethanol, y = c15, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers',
            name = '15°C', line = list(color = colors[7],  width = 2),
            marker = list(color = colors[7],  size = 9)) %>%
  add_trace(x = ethanol, y = c20, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers',
            name = '20°C', line = list(color = colors[9],  width = 2),
            marker = list(color = colors[9],  size = 9),
            connectgaps = FALSE) %>%
  add_trace(x = ethanol, y = c30, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers',
            name = '30°C', line = list(color = colors[11], width = 2),
            marker = list(color = colors[11], size = 9)) %>%
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "Anhydrous ethanol, parts by mass", showgrid = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "Contraction", showgrid = TRUE,
                 gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
                ),
    plot_bgcolor = 'white',
    paper_bgcolor = 'white',
    legend = list(orientation = 'h', x = 0.5, xanchor = 'center', y = -0.2)
  )
```
